creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to feh from comment #44)

So the newer drm-515-kmod in ports may not compile on 14.1, but then this is a separate problem.

I guess you don't have the ports tree to rebuild drm-515-kmod version 5.15.118_3, the one that was failing.  That would be the interesting test to do with respect to my question above.

Please report any failure you may encounter.
